tasks.label: Validate Project - Full
tasks.detail: 执行完整的项目验证（编号、重复、注册表、链接）

tasks.label: Validate Project - JSON Output
tasks.detail: 执行项目验证并输出JSON报告

tasks.label: Validate Mermaid - Online
tasks.detail: 使用在线API验证Mermaid图表（需要网络）

tasks.label: Validate Cross References
tasks.detail: 验证文档交叉引用和链接

tasks.label: Run All Validations
tasks.command: echo "=== 1. 项目验证 ===" && python .vscode/validate-project.py && echo "" && echo "=== 2. Mermaid验证 ===" && python .vscode/validate-mermaid.py && echo "" && echo "=== 3. 交叉引用验证 ===" && python .vscode/validate-cross-refs.py

tasks.label: Generate Validation Report (JSON)
tasks.detail: 生成JSON格式的完整验证报告
tasks.command: python .vscode/validate-project.py --json > validation-report.json && python .vscode/validate-mermaid.py --json > mermaid-report.json && python .vscode/validate-cross-refs.py --json > crossrefs-report.json && echo "报告已生成: validation-report.json, mermaid-report.json, crossrefs-report.json"

tasks.label: Check Theorem Registry Consistency
tasks.detail: 检查定理注册表与文档的一致性
tasks.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.vscode'); from validate_project import ProjectValidator; v = ProjectValidator('.'); v.load_registry(); v.scan_all_files(); v.validate(); print(f'文档中元素数: {len(v.all_elements)}'); print(f'注册表元素数: {len(v.registry_elements)}'); print(f'未注册: {len(v.report.missing_in_registry)}'); print(f'注册表多余: {len(v.report.orphaned_in_registry)}')"
